message:
fix: saturating arithmetic, correct negative timestamps, and normalize policy input

Three independent safety and correctness fixes:

1. conformal.rs: Replace quantile_idx.min(n) - 1 with
   saturating_sub(1) to prevent underflow panic when n is 0 or
   quantile_idx resolves to 0.

2. tui_events.rs: Use div_euclid/rem_euclid for microsecond-to-
   HH:MM:SS.mmm conversion to correctly handle negative timestamps
   (pre-epoch), where regular division would produce wrong values.
   Remove .max(1) from FenwickViewportIndex count to allow returning
   0 when no items are consumed instead of falsely reporting 1.

3. identity.rs: Move attachments_policy normalization (trim +
   to_ascii_lowercase) to the call site before validation, rather
   than redundantly inside is_valid_attachments_policy. Error messages
   show the original user input for clarity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
